scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @remote/api && npm run build -w @remote/web
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web "node apps/api/dist/server.js" "npm run dev -w @remote/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tests/e2e/tsconfig.json --noEmit
